name: Fantasy Mosaics 33: Inventor's Workshop
short_description: This new collection of mosaics puzzles will lead you to discover the workshop of a mysterious inventor. Are you ready to tackle his secret puzzles and solve them? Immerse yourself in the interactive inventor's workshop and play his original mini games! Enjoy new puzzles and mysteries this new installment has in store for you!
detailed_description: Fantasy Mosaics 33 is a new installment of multi-color mosaics puzzles based on pixel art images.  The gameplay is an original variation of the popular picross or nonogram genre. The app features innovative mini games and a wizard's workshop to explore.
about_the_game: Fantasy Mosaics 33 is a new installment of multi-color mosaics puzzles based on pixel art images.  The gameplay is an original variation of the popular picross or nonogram genre. The app features innovative mini games and a wizard's workshop to explore.
